Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a specific item for her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2107 0 0}Ooh, you're lookin' for a handheld game console?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Are you hooked on games now? Is it 'cause of the game I gave you last time, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I can give you my old one if you're cool with it. Lately, I've only been using the newer, slimmer model.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}No point having two of the same consoles anyways. Hold on, lemme grab it for ya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let's play a match one day! I'll take you on anytime.[n]{f 1 1}
